assertion_results.text: Sibling check correctly classifies TC-8001 as a different-stream companion (stream [rhtpa-2.2] vs current issue's [rhtpa-2.1]), not a same-stream duplicate (Step 4)
assertion_results.evidence: sibling-check.md lines 18-20: 'TC-8001: Stream suffix [rhtpa-2.2] vs current issue TC-8006 stream suffix [rhtpa-2.1] — Classification: Different-stream companion (NOT a same-stream duplicate)' with rationale explaining these are companion trackers, not duplicates.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.2 checks the current issue's existing issuelinks before attempting to create a 'Related' link to TC-8001 (§1.58)
assertion_results.evidence: sibling-check.md lines 29-35: 'Checking existing issuelinks on TC-8006 (from Step 1 data extraction) for a pre-existing Related link to TC-8001' — found existing Link ID 1990401, type Related, direction outward (TC-8006 -> TC-8001). The check verifies type.name is 'Related' and outwardIssue.key matches TC-8001.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.2 detects the pre-existing 'Related' link to TC-8001 and skips link creation — does NOT call jira.create_link (§1.58)
assertion_results.evidence: sibling-check.md lines 36-40: 'Result: Related link to TC-8001 already exists -- skipping link creation.' and 'No jira.create_link call is made. The existing link (ID 1990401) already establishes the cross-stream relationship between TC-8006 and TC-8001.'

assertion_results.text: The output includes a log message indicating the link was skipped because it already exists (e.g., 'Related link to TC-8001 already exists — skipping')
assertion_results.evidence: sibling-check.md line 38: '> Related link to TC-8001 already exists -- skipping'. Also repeated in triage-outcome.md line 31 with identical wording.

assertion_results.text: The sibling landscape table is still presented to the engineer despite the link already existing — the idempotent check only affects link creation, not the sibling summary
assertion_results.evidence: sibling-check.md lines 49-55 presents the 'Sibling Landscape Table' with both TC-8001 (2.2.x, In Progress) and TC-8006 (2.1.x, New). triage-outcome.md lines 36-42 confirms: 'Despite the link already existing, the sibling landscape table was still presented to the engineer for situational awareness' followed by the full table.
